title: AnimusAgentSchema
description: Defines the state variables, dynamics, and compiler settings for an Animus agent

variables.description: Ordered list of continuous state variable names, each in [0,1]

baselines.description: Resting-state value per variable. State returns toward these under homeostasis.

homeostasis_rate.description: λ — rate of return toward baseline. ~0.08 is a natural feel. Higher = faster recovery.

coupling.description: Cross-variable coupling matrix. coupling.energy.mood = 0.3 means energy pulls mood by 0.3 per tick.

circadian.description: Circadian rhythm — shifts baselines by time of day

peaks.description: HH:MM times of peak energy (typically 2 peaks)

floor.description: Minimum energy level at the circadian trough (night)

noise.description: Bounded autocorrelated noise added each tick — creates organic variability

events.description: Custom event types beyond built-ins. Each event maps variable names to kick magnitudes.

compiler.description: Mood-line compiler configuration — controls natural-language output

bands.description: Per-variable band labels. Each variable has low/mid/high text.

memory_injection.description: Whether to inject top-3 spreading-activated memory nodes into the mood-line

growth.description: Slow baseline growth rules — how the agent changes over months of use
